title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MT Educare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MT Educare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the MT Educare family as a Curriculum Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
